name: domain
description: Maintain UPPERCASE <DOMAIN>.md files at project root as living current-state snapshots (overwrite, NOT append; no history inside the file — git log is the only chronological record). /domain <NAME> [update directive] · NL trigger ('ROADMAP 업데이트', 'STATUS.md 정리해줘'). Examples: ROADMAP.md · STATUS.md · PLAN.md · GOAL.md · BACKLOG.md · ARCHITECTURE.md · DECISIONS.md.
